name: design-system-spacious
title: Spacious
description: Generous whitespace, consistent padding, and grid-based layouts for clean, readable, and breathing interfaces.

query.en: Generate a {{artifactKind}} using the Spacious design system. Stay faithful to its colour palette, typography, spacing, iconography, and component vocabulary as documented in DESIGN.md.
